_note: This is the single source of truth for all public-facing role data. The embed reads from this file at build time or it is inlined manually. Keep descriptions warm, clear, and jargon-free.

ministryAreas.label: Guest Experience
ministryAreas.description: Be the first face people see. Help newcomers feel welcome and find their way from the parking lot to their seat.

roles.label: Parking Team
roles.description: Guide cars, help families, and set the tone before anyone walks through the door.

roles.label: Greeter
roles.description: Welcome people at the door with a genuine hello. No script needed — just be yourself.

roles.label: Hospitality
roles.description: Serve coffee, snacks, and conversation before and after services.

roles.label: Connections Table
roles.description: Help newcomers take a next step — whether that's getting info, meeting someone, or signing up for something.

ministryAreas.label: Worship
ministryAreas.description: Lead people into worship through music and atmosphere. Whether you sing, play, or run sound, there's a place for you.

roles.label: Vocalist
roles.description: Sing on the worship team during Sunday services or special events.

roles.label: Musician
roles.description: Play guitar, keys, bass, drums, or another instrument on the worship team.

ministryAreas.label: Production
ministryAreas.description: Run the technical side of Sunday services — sound, lighting, video, and livestream.

roles.label: Audio
roles.description: Mix front-of-house or monitors for Sunday services.

roles.label: Lighting
roles.description: Design and operate lighting for worship and teaching.

roles.label: Video / Camera
roles.description: Operate cameras or direct video for in-room screens and livestream.

roles.label: Lyrics & Graphics
roles.description: Run ProPresenter to display lyrics, sermon notes, and announcements.

ministryAreas.label: Creative & Communications
ministryAreas.description: Tell the 2Rivers story through design, photography, video, and social media.

roles.label: Graphic Design
roles.description: Create graphics for social media, series artwork, and print materials.

roles.label: Photography
roles.description: Capture Sundays, events, and community moments.

roles.label: Video Production
roles.description: Film and edit short-form content for social media and announcements.

roles.label: Social Media
roles.description: Help manage and post content to 2Rivers social channels.

ministryAreas.label: Kids & Students
ministryAreas.description: Help the next generation encounter Jesus and build real friendships.

roles.label: 2R Kids Teacher
roles.description: Lead age-group curriculum in a fun, engaging environment for kids birth–5th grade.

roles.label: 2R Kids Assistant
roles.description: Support the lead teacher and help kids feel safe and included.

roles.label: Student Ministry Volunteer
roles.description: Invest in middle and high school students during weekly programming.

ministryAreas.label: Outreach & Missions
ministryAreas.description: Serve our city and world. From local partnerships to global trips, find a way to make a difference.

roles.label: Local Outreach
roles.description: Serve alongside local partner organizations and community initiatives.

roles.label: Mission Trips
roles.description: Join a team traveling domestically or internationally to serve.

ministryAreas.label: Behind the Scenes
ministryAreas.description: The stuff that has to happen for Sunday to happen — from setup to facilities to tech support.

roles.label: Setup & Teardown
roles.description: Arrive early to set up chairs, tables, and equipment. Help break things down after service.

roles.label: Facilities
roles.description: Keep the building clean, functional, and ready for use throughout the week.
